title: Enterprise Operations Copilot
tagline: Natural-language operations over fragmented enterprise data.
problem: Ops teams drown in fragmented systems and tribal knowledge, losing time hunting for answers across tools.
highlights: Agentic planning that reasons across multiple tools
Workflow automation for repetitive operational tasks
Guarded execution against systems of record

title: AI Incident Commander
tagline: Detects, triages, and narrates incidents in real time.
problem: During incidents, engineers waste critical minutes correlating signals across logs and dashboards.
highlights: Reads logs and telemetry across systems
Generates postmortem drafts and coordinates comms

title: AI Codebase Onboarding Agent
tagline: Turns a repository into an interactive mentor.
problem: New engineers take weeks to get productive in large, unfamiliar codebases.
highlights: Upload a repository and index it into a graph + vector store

title: Campaign Builder Platform
tagline: A multi-step platform for creating and managing marketing campaigns.
problem: Marketing teams needed to build and manage complex, multi-step campaigns without pulling in engineering for every change.
highlights: Multi-step campaign builder shipped as a SolidJS micro-frontend
Spring Boot backend-for-frontend orchestrating downstream services
Layered validation architecture across client, BFF, and domain
Caching strategy for high-read configuration data

title: Secure Image Processing Pipeline
tagline: A secure upload workflow that sanitizes images before processing.
problem: User-uploaded images are a malware vector and must be neutralized before any downstream processing touches them.
highlights: Content Disarm & Reconstruction (CDR) integration to neutralize malicious payloads
Robust error handling and quarantine paths

title: Debounced Save Queue
tagline: Lossless autosave under heavy, racing user edits.
problem: Rapid user edits generated excessive, racing save requests that overwhelmed the backend and risked lost work.

title: Developer Resource Portal
tagline: A centralized hub for engineering tools, repos, and resources.
problem: Engineers wasted time hunting for tools, repositories, and documentation scattered across systems.
highlights: Centralized access to tools, repositories, and engineering resources
Information architecture tuned for fast retrieval
